reviews.comment:
Pedí un café con un tostado y en 30 minutos no me lo llevaron, Domingo 23/03 18.00 hs aprox. Me termine yendo. Malísima atencion no vuelvo más.

(Translated by Google)
I ordered a roasted coffee, and it wasn't delivered within 30 minutes. Sunday, March 23, approximately 6:00 PM. I ended up leaving. Terrible service, I won't be back.

reviews.comment:
Solemos hacer una parada en este lugar yendo o volviendo de Buenos Aires y en distintos horarios ,siempre nos atendieron con muy buena disposición.
Baños limpios,lugar para estacionar ,para detenerse a descansar un rato,comer o tomar algo .
Llenar el termo para seguir el viaje.
Muy recomendable.Excelente atención tanto de los playeros como de las chicas que atienden la cafetería.

(Translated by Google)
We often stop here on our way to or from Buenos Aires at different times of day, and the service has always been very helpful.
Clean restrooms, parking, a place to stop and rest for a while, eat, or have a drink. A great spot to fill up your thermos for the rest of your trip. Highly recommended. Excellent service from both the attendants and the women who work in the café.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRaWFXR1NREAE

reviews.comment:
Paramos para almorzar. Las empanadas de jamón y queso son bien caseritas y deliciosas. También probamos una ciabatta tostada muy suculenta (tenía como 5 fetas de jamón) y  unos sandwich de miga integrales. Todo fresquito.
Los baños estaba aceptablemente limpios.
Cuenta con rampa y sanitarios para discapacitados.
Afuera hay un dispenser de agua caliente para el mate GRATIS, cortesía de Taragüí.
Junto a la estación hay un área verde de recreo con buena sombra y jugos para niños.
La estación es pequeñita y tiene una estética "rtero".
Por su ubicación estratégica, por su pintoresco edificio y por pertenecer al ACA, es un emblema de Arrecifes.
Lamentablemente la autopista complejizó su acceso.
Ojalá la aggiornen para que pueda competir con las demás, sin perder su singularidad

(Translated by Google)
We stopped for lunch. The ham and cheese empanadas were homemade and delicious. We also tried a very tasty toasted ciabatta (it had about 5 slices of ham) and some whole-wheat finger sandwiches. Everything was fresh.
The restrooms were acceptably clean.
It has a ramp and restrooms for people with disabilities.
Outside there's a FREE hot water dispenser for mate, courtesy of Taragüí.
Next to the station there's a green recreation area with good shade and a juice bar for children.
The station is small and has a "rtero" aesthetic.
Because of its strategic location, its picturesque building, and its affiliation with the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina), it's an emblem of Arrecifes.
Unfortunately, the highway has complicated access.
Hopefully they'll modernize it so it can compete with the others without losing its unique character.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURnbEkybkh3EAE

reviews.comment:
Exelente atención de las chicas. Me dio q nos pasamos de la entrada y tuvimos q dar una vuelta complicada   los baños super limpios .  Estuvimos 3 de febrero 2025. A eso de las nueve de la noche. Dejamos un termo stanley verde  apoyado. Por si lo llegan a encontrar. Gracias .

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the staff. I think we missed the entrance and had to take a complicated detour. The bathrooms were spotless. We were there on February 3, 2025, around 9:00 PM. We left a green Stanley thermos on the counter, in case anyone finds it. Thank you.
